message:
fix: prefetch sidebar dashboard chunks eagerly to prevent nav delay (#7790)

The lazy chunk for ClusterAdmin/Security/etc downloaded during
navigation while the connection pool was busy, causing the old page
content to stay visible for seconds.

Two fixes:
1. Add cluster-admin, security, deploy to ALWAYS_PREFETCH so their
   chunks are cached at startup.
2. Add 2s timeout to fetchEnabledDashboards() — if busy, fall through
   to prefetching all chunks.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
